title: [Control Systems] Moxa security advisory (AV26-594)
description: On June 12, 2026, Moxa published a security advisory to address vulnerabilities in the following products:
products: UC-1200A / UC-2200A /UC-3400A /UC-4400A /UC-8200 series  multiple versions and models
V1200 Series  version v1.2.0 and prior
V3200 / V3400 series  version v1.1 and prior
V2406C WL Models  version v1.2 and prior
solution: Review the references and apply the necessary updates.
